title: pi-chart structured constraints
description: Machine-readable constraint block embedded in the YAML frontmatter of constraints.md. Lets pi-agent avoid parsing prose for safety-critical decisions (allergies, code status, preferences). The narrative body of constraints.md remains canonical for nuance; this is the queryable subset.

allergies.description: Substances the patient cannot tolerate. Each entry must carry status so retired allergies can be retained for history.

code_status.description: Resuscitation status. Required field once any structured constraints block is authored; use 'unspecified' to defer.

preferences.description: Snake_case preference tokens, e.g. minimize_sedation_if_possible, return_to_work_priority.

advance_directive.description: Free-text or document reference. Empty/absent if none on file.
